behavior: Dated UK, EU, and India starter manifests preserve reviewed policy and provenance, exact regional metadata, real evaluation references, explicit incomplete coverage, and no unsupported runtime or native-source claim.
revision_scope: The committed region manifest date and provenance contract, stipend and not-disclosed pay semantics, UK, EU, and India starter fixtures, corrected US contract baseline, and focused fail-closed tests.

commands.command: env -u JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS cargo test -p jobsentinel-domain v3_region_manifest_tests --no-fail-fast
commands.relevant_result: The fail-first run rejected the missing UK, EU, and India fixtures and missing stipend and not-disclosed pay semantics.
commands.caveat: This was the expected Red phase. The command could not compile until the contract and fixtures existed.

commands.command: env -u JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS cargo test -p jobsentinel-domain --lib v3_region_manifest_tests --no-fail-fast
commands.relevant_result: All 4 focused regional tests passed. The fixtures have exact regional metadata, incomplete coverage, no native-source claim, real evaluation references, deterministic review dates, and fail-closed reference validation.
commands.caveat: The fixtures are research metadata only. They do not install a source adapter or RegionalPackCheck runtime action.

commands.relevant_result: All 144 domain tests passed after the final hostile-reference validation correction.
commands.caveat: Every Rust test command explicitly disabled live keyring tests. No Tauri process, credential flow, or live source was launched.

commands.relevant_result: Every Rust workspace crate compiled after the deterministic RegionManifest parser signature change.
commands.caveat: This was a compile check, not the full workspace test suite.

commands.command: cargo fmt --all -- --check; env -u JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS cargo clippy -p jobsentinel-domain --lib -- -D warnings; npm run harness:check; npm run lint:architecture; npm run lint:file-size; git diff --check
commands.relevant_result: Formatting, production domain linting with warnings denied, harness state, architecture ownership, hard file limits, and patch whitespace passed.
commands.caveat: The all-target domain Clippy lane remains unsuitable because the repository deny-lints legacy test unwraps across unrelated files. The established library-only lane passed.

commands.command: npm run lint:docs; npm run test:scripts
commands.relevant_result: Markdown, local links, prose, canonical state, and all 838 script-contract tests passed.
commands.caveat: The first harness run correctly rejected an overlong active-state line. The final compact state passed without increasing its 160-line budget.

commands.command: One independent read-only adversarial review of provenance, policy separation, regional truth, evaluation references, dates, hostile URLs, current EU scope, and runtime claims
commands.relevant_result: The reviewer returned APPROVE after dated provenance, exact EU27 scope, real evaluation references, work-mode-only labels, and credential-free public HTTPS validation were enforced.
commands.caveat: The review confirmed these are incomplete English-only research manifests, not production source integrations or complete regional readiness.

decisions.coverage: The UK, EU, and India fixtures set incomplete_coverage to true and claim only English metadata, regional-board research, and user import.
decisions.source_runtime: No RegionalPackCheck action, scheduled source, native API, authenticated session, or external transport was added.
decisions.provenance: Every manifest has a deterministic review date, policy notes, and separate provenance references. External references must pass the existing credential-free public HTTPS validator.
decisions.evaluation: Every referenced evaluation ID resolves in the frozen v3 evaluation set. The corrected US contract baseline follows the same rule.
decisions.regional_semantics: The EU fixture contains the exact 27 EU country codes and July 2026 currency set. Stipend and not-disclosed pay semantics are contract values; relocation and cross-border semantics remain outside the current work-mode field.
decisions.credential_tests: Keep live keyring tests opt-in. Every unattended Rust test command unsets JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS.

review.adversarial_verdict: APPROVE after provenance, exact-scope, evaluation-reference, and hostile-URL corrections
remaining_findings: Milestone 4 still needs origin-bound Browser Import replacement, generic Smart Paste and browser-origin applied-logging disposition, simulator closure, and Gate 3 evidence.
The starter manifests do not yet provide regional pay parsers, taxonomy bridges, CV implementation, localized UI, or production source integrations.
Windows 11 and Linux were not live-checked for this data-only contract slice; deterministic parser tests and workspace compilation provide platform-independent coverage.
Repository GitHub Actions must be re-enabled and verified before merge.
Commit c5422e63 is local-only until a non-Keychain GitHub credential becomes available.
